parsed.availability_comment: No adverse availability report found for the early IPL window.
parsed.availability_note: Nottinghamshire said he would miss the start of the English domestic season because IPL 2026 runs from 26 March to 31 May; that covers DC's opening fixtures.
parsed.followup_reason: Need actual DC team-sheet evidence from opening matches to confirm whether Duckett starts ahead of an extra overseas bowler or Miller.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Duckett's route is as overseas opener/floating keeper, but Stubbs is entrenched and DC also carry Miller plus premium overseas quicks.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competing for one of the batting overseas slots alongside retained core overseas names and pace options.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Available and profile fits top-order left-hander/keeper cover, but not a locked first-choice overseas starter.

- If evidence remains conflicting, say so explicitly and keep needs_player_followup=true.
- Every source URL array must contain at least one URL.

Refine this single-player non-stats assessment and return the structured JSON.
